entities.name: Professional identity is narrative, not document

entities.name: Narrative-driven identity
entities.context: Approach where a person is a collection of meaningful experiences and stories

entities.name: Semantic rendering
entities.context: The ability to truthfully re-render experiences into various forms while maintaining consistency

entities.name: Document-bound identity
entities.context: The rejected approach where identity is syntactically tied to specific document formats
